scripts.lint: pnpm -r --if-present lint && uv run --group dev ruff check .
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && uv run --group dev mypy apps/api/src apps/worker/src
scripts.test: pnpm -r --if-present test && uv run --group dev pytest
scripts.contracts:generate: uv run --package logion-api python -m logion_api.openapi_export packages/contracts/openapi/openapi.json && pnpm --filter @logion/contracts generate:types && pnpm --filter @logion/contracts generate:sync
scripts.ci:fast: pnpm guard:context && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm contracts:check
